hub_subtitle: Business English for the boardroom, the summit and the interview

lesson.menu_desc: Meeting a colleague at the Data & AI Summit -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself Professionally -- Meeting a Colleague at the Summit
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 1 -- Introducing Yourself Professionally

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the International Data and AI Summit here in São Paulo. My name is Helen, and I am one of the event hosts. The opening keynote starts at ten o'clock in the main hall. Throughout the day, we have talks on scaling data pipelines, the future of artificial intelligence, and working with global vendors. Engineering leaders from many countries are here today. Please introduce yourself to new people, share your business card, and build new connections. If you need any help, our team is at the front desk. Have a wonderful summit.
